message:
style(abi): rustfmt normalization across XDR/RPC and dlfcn modules

Pure formatting pass with no logic changes:
- rpc_abi.rs: expand single-line if-guards, unsafe blocks, struct
  literals, and static initializers to multi-line form; reformat
  function signatures and RecStream field groups to one-per-line
- dlfcn_abi.rs: remove trailing whitespace in dlsym
- xdr_abi_test.rs: compact multi-line assert_eq!(unsafe{...}) to
  single-line form throughout roundtrip tests; reformat XdrHandle
  struct literal to trailing-comma style

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
